reviews.review_description: I really want to love this game, but I had to play certain sections so often because bugs would softlock me that I can't really recommend it to anyone wishing for a good time. Its a shame really because it is such a feelgood game, but when another bug hits and hinders progress it just turns those feelings on its head.

I appreciate the art and all the effort put into the story, but the dialogue is excessively long. It's pretty much a point-and-click “game”, and the mechanics in the battles don't really work. I was hitting a rock forever, and nothing happened, so I gave up. I don't understand. I wasted so much time on this. Nothing is really satisfying in this game. I don't get all the good reviews.
This game is really fun and I wish there were more levels

reviews.review_title: A bit bothered but happy now
reviews.review_description:
At the start when I kept exiting the train and talking to Botan. My would crash during the chat or moving part of that scene. It kept happening even while I was offline. I left the game for two days then came back and it was fine. The experience was and still is great. I enjoyed the multitude of mini challenges. The story line is great, wacky and goofy. The bugs/birds/cats glitch out, resulting in them spontaneously appearing and disappearing quickly. Not a big deal though it may make future challenges a little difficult. Other than that I really enjoy the game. If you’re looking to get a great offline game with a long story and plenty of mini games, this is for you.

Inclusion: Your welcome Mr or Miss developer. Also thank you too for the quick response and your dedication to making repairs to your game. You are certified awesome in my books.

Final inclusion: Thank you, very much! The game is perfect now!! I really respect your work and commitment. This game has been absent from me for a few days too long and to get this update has made my year. Thank you again!!!

I really like this game, the manga style story telling and quirky characters are charming and the length of the game appears about right however I am sadly unable to complete it as I keep getting a black screen at the same point of the game. I have contacted developer with no reply which is the only reason I gave it a 4 otherwise it would of been a 5. Hope you have better luck than me when playing.
UPDATE developer came back to me and helped. If anyone else has same issue take it off story mode, I did that and the game carried in. Thanks for the help!

reviews.review_title: I LOVE IT AND I NEED MORE
reviews.review_description: It's a fantastic game, I love it so so so soooo much. This is why I ask MAKE DLC CONTENT or another update or something because this game is so fun that I just need it allllll the time, make another game as well... Because it's just too good to not have more...

reviews.review_title: SOO GOOD IT NEEDS A ANOTHER GAME
reviews.review_description: Ever since I got a vr I was so bored like I got fighting games but I wanted to have a slice of life game with 3D gameplay and legends and this game just fits into  so good I will glaze it so much until it has a second game. But still I need to be in discord so I can glaze more
Awesome game but the table tennis gets WAY TO HARD and seven need to make table tennis easier Amazing game overall and some times glitches, (Please make part two soon😅❤️)
This is the best vr game i have played so far. The art work/graphics are amazing, the world is impressive and cozy, the storyline and gameplay is incredibly fun and the controls are super simple.

I’m not really a fan of anime/manga type of things but this is my one exception in other words it’s a really good game and the little pictures with the people’s emotions or story’s is a really good feature and makes the game a lot better

reviews.review_title: Cute and inexpensive but needs more
reviews.review_description: As stated above its an amusing game especially if you're an anime fan. Surprised it had an English dubbing which was nice. Wish there was more gameplay elements to it though as most actions are just to move the story along. There is no earning money keeping and selling fish or other sandboxy things to do. Also since the last update there seems to be a movement error as my headset snaps the frame as I turn my head and it throws everything off.

developer_response.body: Could you please join our Discord and provide more info about this "snaps the frame" issue you're experiencing? We'd love to help you resolve that, but we've had no similar bug reports.

reviews.review_description: Looked great but when passed the keys just 5-10 minutes in to the game, the controls just stop working and game won't progress.

developer_response.body: Hi, could you please join our Discord so we can help you out? We're unaware of any situation where the controls are unresponsive. We'd love to help you resolve this. Once you get the key, you need to physically place it in the apartment door.

reviews.review_title: Amazing but theirs bugs in it lately
reviews.review_description: Like when i play it makes me start over or make me eight feet tall and not that long please add more storylines n fix these errors please i really love this game and would love to continue to play without problems

developer_response.body: Please check your boundary settings to ensure your floor height is correct. If you're still having issues, please contact us on Discord and we'll be happy to help you out.

reviews.review_description: I gotta say one of the best anime Vr experiences if you like cute animes you’re gonna love this game. ￼ fun VR mechanics. To ￼
great game with original ideas. Only note is add more things to interact with.

There is nothing to do but walk around talking to people and listening to dialogue. That's it. Like being in a cartoon.
Graphics are nice but you literally don't do anything it's not a game.
I have just started this game and I stopped just to write this review. It is very well made with a very nice atmosphere and overall it feels relaxing and enjoyable with a good story.
I really, really love this game!  I don’t think I can say anything better than what has already been said, but I can’t recommend this enough!
it seems like a good game but i can't open the door to the sushi shop

developer_response.body: Hi, could you please join our Discord so we can help you resolve this? If you're stuck at the beginning, you'll need to approach the statue near the door before going inside.

reviews.review_description: The game was fun to play and the story was good.

Absolutely loved it
Gorgeous with loveable characters, an amazing story, fun mini games, and not action-packed while still being captivating and fun

The only criticism I could possibly have is that I have to wait for a continuation of the story
I'm completely in love with this game and now I'm a certified Big Brane Studios fan

reviews.review_title: HELP me l am flying p
reviews.review_description: When l was fishing Idk help Me

reviews.review_title: The sequel can’t come quick enough!
reviews.review_description: What’s to say?! Every fan girl, boys dream! Never enough sushi! Please release the second part soon!

I really enjoyed this game! The storyline is engaging as you help save a little town from real-estate mongrels by doing tasks for the townspeople. The art is beautifully done, and while I enjoyed the music, it could use a bit more variety (although the reference to my favorite genre Heavy Metal was an awesome suprise). 
Oh, and KITTY'S!!! I had to take frequent breaks to run around with them because I love their meows and really, I smiled the entire time I played this game.

reviews.review_title: Amazing story! Just wish there was more
reviews.review_description: I just wanna say this story was amazing, there was so much to the game that had me loving it! The way the characters look, act and so much more just makes me so happy! I just wish we could have gotten more to it, i would pay to see more of the story and I hope we can, in the meantime I'm just glad I got to experience the story itself, maybe the next update we may get to hear more about the character we play as! I never really knew what he looked like anyways!

reviews.review_title: Must play for slice of life anime lovers
reviews.review_description:
This game perfectly captures the campy and sweet feeling of a slice of life anime, and it looks and sounds great! The tropes and characterization are like eating a favorite snack, and my favorite parts are actually when you eat the sushi because it was oddly satisfying using the trigger to make the chopsticks pinch.

I do wish that they would finish the story soon since that was my only disappointment. I was looking forward to some type of hopeful ending, but instead it felt more like a cliffhanger of season 1. Please continue and finish since the art, animations, and voice acting are all truly top notch!

reviews.review_title: Cult following.. just joking, or am I?..
reviews.review_description:
I don’t know what I was expecting when I purchased. Maybe I was expecting some sim? Whatever it was, I was drawn in by my love for anime. 

Boy, this has delivered and more! It’s so charming. There’s so many things to discover. And the story is funny! And fun! Recently joined their discord and found that they had a recently passed pledge thing for one of its adorable characters, and I wished I had gotten in on that. They also had a voice auditioning for English - I was like, whoa, they’re adding English voiceovers ! And 4-5 more hours of content to be updated soon. That’s huge for this game! I realized that this game is just so loved by many people, not just me.

Can’t wait to see what else the creators of this game brings. I absolutely adore this game.

reviews.review_title: If I were to get isekai
reviews.review_description:
If I were to get isekai, this would be one of my choices if there is such an option. Hopefully, without truck kuns help. Jk.

I like to browse on the app to look for some good games and keep on passing this up. But then I decided to look into it, and based on the things I read, I would probably enjoy it... Soon enough, it went on sale and got the game. If they ever make a 2nd one, I'd be preordering it. 

Enjoyed the game even from the start, at the train. Called my friend up to tell him about it. Hahaha. Liked it so much I bought a copy for my friend to play.
Gotta love a good jojo reference, just wish you could make sushi too 🥲
I wana smash minami

I love the game , i feel that the art style is beautiful and makes me love the characters though after the story the town feels like a ghost town there's no one around except mail man 

It's also a shame that we can't play the table tennis mini game after the story and the archery range doesn't show where the arrow lands anymore

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear you generally enjoyed the game! And sorry for the inconvenience.

Great news! We have a big update coming soon which addresses all of this! We'll be adding side quests and many things to do once the story is complete.

In the meantime, you can use the Quests menu to replay the table tennis quest.

reviews.review_description: It was good enough for me to finish it even though repetitive. Lotsa dialogs in japonese.   If you speak japonese it is great.  would be great to pay voice actor and translate in english.

reviews.review_title: Sin Español, ni audio ni subtitulos
reviews.review_description: Sin Español, ni audio ni subtitulos

developer_response.body: ¡Sushi Ben ahora es compatible con el español!

reviews.review_description:
Sushi Ben is an absolute joy to play. Although I haven't finished it yet, it captivated me completely from the start. I'm taking my time with it, to completely take in every detail this game has to offer. 

The artwork is stunning, and the mechanics are enjoyable. The voice acting is top-notch, delivered by a fantastic team.

It's evident that a lot of hard work, love, and attention went into this game, and it shines through in every detail. Highly recommended!
There's no voices or music nothing but silence. Not sure why but I guess if you can get over the quite it's ok to play

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry you're experiencing that. There are definitely voices and music in the game. Can you please confirm that your Quest volume is on? Also, in the game settings there is a section for Audio. In that section, please confirm that all the sliders for voice and music are up to a comfortable level.

reviews.review_title: Good game but story not finished!
reviews.review_description: So i love the story is funny ( if you hate anime trope... You wouldn't love it) the music is relaxing and the voice acting is nice the interactivity out side the game is zero( no need for fishing....or even eat at sushi) but then why i did put 1 star?... The story is not complete and there is no mention about it so until the story was suddenly stopped... I wasn't happy so until the storyline is done 1 star so beware (and yes its was worth playing it but I'm not happy to suddenly stop while thinking the story was completed)
I spent two long hard hours to pass this challenge the red fish who thinks that this is fun I want to play the game but I can't pass the red fish cause I'm stuck😭😭😭😭😭😭

developer_response.body:
Hello, we're sorry to hear that you are having trouble with the fishing! Are you stabilizing the rod with your left hand by moving it to the location indicated by the transparent, glowing hand? If that is still too challenging, we recommend enabling Story Mode for that section of the game to bypass the fishing mini-game. But don't forget to turn Story Mode back off once you have passed that part. 

Also feel free to join our community Discord server if you need more help.
https://discord.gg/Ry2qqTP8

reviews.review_description: I can’t progress after getting to the part where you need to tail the land shark guy. The game just crashes when he gets to the other one. It’s not possible to progress through it! Great game, but I’m just so annoyed about this.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing Sushi Ben - we can completely understand how crashes can be frustrating, and we're happy to say that we believe we have fixed this in our most recent patch. Please let us know if you continue to experience this issue after updating, (or any others). For more info, feel free to take a look at our patch notes on our website. Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
🔗🌲/mushtube. 
Have been following the development of Sushi Ben since 2021. So glad it’s finally released!! Great use of vr in narratives. Chill music and beautiful arts! Must try!

reviews.review_title: A Chill, Slice of Life, Fun Adventure
reviews.review_description: Help a sushi shop, catch fish, bugs, and ghosts and be incredibly smitten by the characters and how they interact with you and each other. A laid back but fun game that takes itself seriously enough for you to care but not enough to where you end up getting put off. Worth every penny.
